description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly green and black color scheme. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer components, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It has a skeletonized stock with an ergonomic pistol grip, and the receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is long and straight, with a squared-off muzzle and a visible muzzle device. The magazine appears to be detachable and box-shaped, integrated seamlessly into the lower receiver. The overall build suggests a weapon designed for urban tactical scenarios, balancing durability, modularity, and ease of handling.
description: A modern, green and black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, long barrel, and full-length Picatinny rail, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, muzzle device, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the receiver and stock structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the Picatinny rail, barrel alignment, and overall slimness of the rifle.
